reference_goals: Gear train — spur/helical/bevel mesh, module/pitch, face width, profile shift
Housing — split-case geometry, inspection cover, bearing bore datums
Shaft/bearing — stepped shaft, key/spline, radial + thrust bearing arrangement
Sealing — input/output lip seals, housing gasket, breather/vent
Lubrication — oil level sight glass, fill/drain plugs, splash/forced-feed path
Mounting — foot/flange mount, torque arm, output coupling interface
needed_metadata: BOM — gear material (case-hardened 20MnCr5, ground 16MnCr5), housing material
Gear data sheet — module, tooth count, helix angle, center distance, backlash
Bearing selection — designation, L10 life, preload method (shim stack/locknut)
Assembly sequence — gear/shaft subassembly, bearing press, housing close, oil fill
needed_engineering_docs: Structural boundary — input torque, shock factor, tooth bending/contact stress
Thermal boundary — power loss heat rejection, oil sump temperature limit
Vibration — gear mesh frequency, housing natural frequency avoidance
safety_boundary: Design reference only; no specific load ratings for sizing certificates.
